input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A blue shark head object with an open mouth and white teeth stands on the left. Beside it, a glass contains a red liquid with ice, a clear straw, and a strip of cooked bacon on the rim. A thick, twisted rope rests on the beige surface in the background. An overlay at the bottom displays "Featured Video: Poblano & Sun-Dried Tomato Bloody Mary" and the "how2heroes" logo.</think><answer></answer>

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A blue shark head object with an open mouth and white teeth stands on the left beside a glass containing red liquid, ice, a clear straw, and a strip of cooked bacon on the rim. A thick, twisted rope rests on the beige surface in the background. An overlay at the bottom displays "Featured Video: Poblano & Sun-Dried Tomato Bloody Mary" and the "how2heroes" logo. [2-4] The initial close-up cross-fades into a medium shot of a man with a beard wearing a grey shirt and white apron behind a bar. On the counter, a blender, large V8 juice bottle, small ingredient bowls, a glass pitcher, and two glasses with yellow liquid appear. Shelves of liquor bottles fill the background. [4-8] The man stands behind the bar counter, gesturing with his hands near a clear glass pitcher and speaking. He then raises his right hand with his palm facing forward while looking towards the camera. The arrangement of items on the bar counter, including the large red juice bottle, small bowls, and glasses with yellow liquid, remains unchanged against the static background shelves filled with liquor bottles. From 12s to 16s, a man in a grey shirt and white apron

[48-56] A man wearing a grey shirt and white apron stands at a bar. He holds a jar of white horseradish in his left hand and uses a spoon in his right hand to scoop the condiment. He moves the spoon over a tall glass pitcher filled with red liquid and deposits the horseradish inside. A blue caption bar appears at the bottom reading "1/3 cup horseradish". He repeats this scooping and depositing action. The caption is visible initially, disappears briefly around 52s, and is displayed again as he continues adding the ingredient. To his left, a large bottle of V8 juice and a small Tabasco bottle sit on the counter. He carefully measures the white substance into the red mixture.

[22-24] A man continues pouring red juice from a large bottle into a tall, clear glass pitcher held steady by his right hand, causing the red liquid level to rise significantly within the vessel. A bottle of horseradish sits on the counter to the left, while two glasses filled with yellow liquid and ice remain stationary on the right. [56-58] The camera cuts to a close-up of the tall glass pitcher, showing the red liquid mixture with visible white chunks of horseradish floating inside. [58-62] A hand holding a small bottle with a white diamond label and green cap appears on the left, pouring red sauce into the mixture. As the ingredient is added, a blue caption bar appears at the bottom reading "2 tbsp Tabasco sauce".

From 66-68s, a man wearing a grey shirt and white apron holds a small bottle upside down over a tall glass pitcher, pouring red sauce into the mixture while a blue caption bar reads "2 tbsp Tabasco sauce". Between 68-70s, he finishes pouring the red sauce, places the small bottle upright on the counter, and the caption disappears as he looks down at the bar surface. From 70-72s, he picks up a long metal spoon, inserts it into the tall glass pitcher containing the red liquid mixture, and begins stirring near the large V8 bottle. Finally, from 72-74s, the man continues stirring the red liquid in the pitcher with the spoon as the camera zooms in for a close-up, revealing a jar of horseradish sitting on the counter behind the pitcher.

A man wearing a grey shirt and white apron pours red sauce from a small bottle into a tall glass pitcher containing red liquid [64-66]. The blue caption bar at the bottom reads "2 tbsp Tabasco sauce". From 74-78, a close-up shows a hand gripping the side of the tall glass pitcher filled with red liquid while a long metal spoon stirs the mixture. A jar of horseradish and a small bottle of sauce sit on the counter nearby. At 78-80, the camera cuts to a medium shot of the man behind the bar continuing to stir the red liquid in the pitcher. The large V8 bottle, small Tabasco bottle, and two glasses containing yellow liquid are visible on the counter.

recent_thinks: [8-10] The man lowers his raised right hand and places it on the green cap of the large red V8 juice bottle. He maintains eye contact with the camera while resting his hand on the bottle. The surrounding bar setup, including the blender, small bowls, and glasses with yellow liquid, remains static.

[10-12] The man in the grey shirt and white apron lifts the large red V8 juice bottle with his right hand. He holds the bottle by its side, raising it slightly off the counter surface. His gaze shifts downward toward the bottle as he handles it. The other items on the bar remain stationary.

[62-64] The camera cuts to a medium shot showing the man in a grey shirt and white apron holding the small bottle. He continues pouring the red sauce into the tall glass pitcher on the counter. The blue caption bar reading "2 tbsp Tabasco sauce" remains visible at the bottom of the screen.

[80-82] A man wearing a grey shirt and white apron stirs red liquid in a tall glass pitcher using a long metal spoon. A blue caption bar appears at the bottom of the screen with the text "makes enough mix for 4 cocktails".

From [100-102], the man holds a silver metal shaker tin and places it upside down over the rim of the left glass, gripping the tin and glass together with both hands to prepare for mixing.

At [10-12], the man in the grey shirt and white apron lifts a large red V8 juice bottle with his right hand, shifting his gaze downward.
